metadata.description: The Microsoft Sentinel workspace into which the function will be deployed. Has to be in the selected Resource Group.
The region of the selected workspace. The default value will use the Region selection above.

properties.displayName: Authentication ASIM parser for VMware ESXi
properties.query:
let parser = (
    starttime: datetime=datetime(null),
    endtime: datetime=datetime(null),
    username_has_any: dynamic=dynamic([]),
    targetappname_has_any: dynamic=dynamic([]),
    srcipaddr_has_any_prefix: dynamic=dynamic([]),
    srchostname_has_any: dynamic=dynamic([]),
    eventtype_in: dynamic=dynamic([]),
    eventresultdetails_in: dynamic=dynamic([]),
    eventresult: string='*',
    disabled: bool=false,
    pack: bool=false
)
{
    let DCUIEvents = (
        Syslog
        | where not(disabled)
        | where (array_length(srcipaddr_has_any_prefix) == 0) // DCUI has no source IP; exclude if IP filter is set
        | where (array_length(srchostname_has_any) == 0) // DCUI has no source hostname; exclude if hostname filter is set
        | where (array_length(targetappname_has_any) == 0 // TargetApp* fields are not set
        | where (isnull(starttime) or TimeGenerated >= starttime)
            and (isnull(endtime) or TimeGenerated <= endtime)
        | where ProcessName == "DCUI"
        // Pre-filtering username
        | where (array_length(username_has_any) == 0 or SyslogMessage has_any (username_has_any))
        | where SyslogMessage has_any ("logged in", "logged out") or SyslogMessage has_all ("Authentication of user", "failed")
        | extend
            TargetUsername = extract(@"[Uu]ser (\S+)", 1, SyslogMessage),
            EventType = case(SyslogMessage has "logged out", "Logoff", "Logon"),
            EventResult = case(
                SyslogMessage has_any ("logged in", "logged out", "succeeded"), "Success",
                SyslogMessage has "failed", "Failure",
                ""
            ),
            EventResultDetails = iff(SyslogMessage has "time out", "Session timeout", ""),
            EventSubType = "Interactive",
            LogonMethod = "Username & Password"
        | where isnotempty(TargetUsername)
        | where (array_length(username_has_any) == 0 or TargetUsername has_any (username_has_any))
        | where (array_length(eventtype_in) == 0 or EventType in~ (eventtype_in))
        | where (array_length(eventresultdetails_in) == 0 or EventResultDetails has_any (eventresultdetails_in))
        | where (eventresult == "*" or EventResult =~ eventresult)
    );
    let HostdEvents = (
        union kind=inner (
            Syslog
            | where not(disabled)
            | where (array_length(targetappname_has_any) == 0 // TargetApp* fields are not set
            | where (array_length(srchostname_has_any) == 0) // Hostd has no source hostname field
            | where (isnull(starttime) or TimeGenerated >= starttime)
                and (isnull(endtime) or TimeGenerated <= endtime)
            | where ProcessName == "Hostd"
            | project TimeGenerated, EventTime, Facility, HostName, SeverityLevel, SyslogMessage, ProcessID, ProcessName, Type
        ), (
            union kind=inner AVSSyslog, AVSEsxiSyslog
            | where not(disabled)
            | where (array_length(targetappname_has_any) == 0 // TargetApp* fields are not set
            | where (array_length(srchostname_has_any) == 0) // Hostd has no source hostname field
            | where (isnull(starttime) or TimeGenerated >= starttime)
                and (isnull(endtime) or TimeGenerated <= endtime)
            | where AppName == "Hostd"
            | project-rename EventTime=LogCreationTime, SyslogMessage=Message, SeverityLevel=Severity, ProcessName=AppName, ProcessID=ProcId
        )
        | where SyslogMessage has_any ("Accepted password", "Rejected password", "Cannot login")
        | where (array_length(username_has_any) == 0 or SyslogMessage has_any (username_has_any))
        | where (array_length(srcipaddr_has_any_prefix) == 0 or SyslogMessage has_any (srcipaddr_has_any_prefix))
        | extend
            TargetUsername = coalesce(
                extract(@"for user (\S+) from", 1, SyslogMessage),
                extract(@"Cannot login user (\S+)@", 1, SyslogMessage),
                extract(@"Cannot login (\S+)@", 1, SyslogMessage)
            ),
            SrcIpAddr = coalesce(
                extract(@"for user \S+ from ([\d.]+)", 1, SyslogMessage),
                extract(@"Cannot login user \S+@([\d.]+)", 1, SyslogMessage),
                extract(@"Cannot login \S+@([\d.]+)", 1, SyslogMessage)
            ),
            EventResult = case(
                SyslogMessage has "Accepted password", "Success",
                SyslogMessage has_any ("Rejected password", "Cannot login"), "Failure",
                ""
            ),
            EventType = "Logon",
            EventSubType = "Remote",
            EventOriginalResultDetails = extract(@"@[\d.]+: (.+)$", 1, SyslogMessage),
            TargetSessionId = extract(@"session=(\S+)", 1, SyslogMessage),
            OperationId = extract(@"opID=([^\s\]]+)", 1, SyslogMessage),
            SessionIdShort = extract(@"sid=([a-f0-9]+)", 1, SyslogMessage)
        | where isnotempty(TargetUsername)
        | where (array_length(username_has_any) == 0 or TargetUsername has_any (username_has_any))
        | where (array_length(srcipaddr_has_any_prefix) == 0 or has_any_ipv4_prefix(SrcIpAddr, srcipaddr_has_any_prefix))
        | where (array_length(eventtype_in) == 0 or EventType in~ (eventtype_in))
        | where (eventresult == "*" or EventResult =~ eventresult)
        | extend EventResultDetails = case(
            EventOriginalResultDetails == "no permission", "Logon violates policy", //Event Type Description: A user could not log in due to insufficient access permission 
            ""
        )
        | where (array_length(eventresultdetails_in) == 0 or EventResultDetails has_any (eventresultdetails_in))
    );
    union DCUIEvents, HostdEvents
    | invoke _ASIM_ResolveDvcFQDN("HostName")
    | project-rename EventOriginalSeverity = SeverityLevel
    | extend
        EventCount = int(1),
        EventStartTime = coalesce(EventTime, TimeGenerated),
        EventEndTime = coalesce(EventTime, TimeGenerated),
        EventVendor = "VMware",
        EventProduct = "ESXi",
        EventSchema = "Authentication",
        EventSchemaVersion = "0.1.4",
        TargetUsernameType = "Simple",
        EventSeverity = _ASIM_LookupSyslogSeverityLevel(EventOriginalSeverity),
        DvcIpAddr = iif(HostIP != "Unknown IP", tostring(HostIP), dynamic(null)),
        DvcOs = "VMkernel",
        TargetHostname = DvcHostname
    | extend
        AdditionalFields = iif(
            pack,
            bag_pack(
                'OperationId', OperationId,
                'SessionIdShort', SessionIdShort
            ),
            dynamic(null)
        )
    | extend
        User = TargetUsername,
        Dvc = DvcHostname,
        IpAddr = SrcIpAddr,
        Src = SrcIpAddr
    | project
        TimeGenerated,
        _ResourceId,
        Type,
        EventCount,
        EventStartTime,
        EventEndTime,
        EventType,
        EventSubType,
        EventResult,
        EventResultDetails,
        EventOriginalResultDetails,
        EventSeverity,
        EventOriginalSeverity,
        EventVendor,
        EventProduct,
        //EventProductVersion,
        EventSchema,
        EventSchemaVersion,
        DvcHostname,
        DvcIpAddr,
        DvcOs,
        DvcDomain,
        DvcDomainType,
        DvcFQDN,
        //DvcId,
        //DvcIdType,
        SrcIpAddr,
        //SrcHostname,
        TargetUsername,
        TargetUsernameType,
        //TargetUserType,
        //TargetUserDomain,
        TargetHostname,
        TargetSessionId,
        LogonMethod,
        //LogonProtocol,
        AdditionalFields,
        User,
        Dvc,
        IpAddr,
        Src
};
parser(
    starttime=starttime,
    endtime=endtime,
    username_has_any=username_has_any,
    targetappname_has_any=targetappname_has_any,
    srcipaddr_has_any_prefix=srcipaddr_has_any_prefix,
    srchostname_has_any=srchostname_has_any,
    eventtype_in=eventtype_in,
    eventresultdetails_in=eventresultdetails_in,
    eventresult=eventresult,
    disabled=disabled,
    pack=pack
)
